ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the observation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the observation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the observation */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal associated with the observation */,
  "observation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation type */,
  "observation_status" TEXT /* Status of the observation (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_type_id") REFERENCES observation_types ("observation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "proposal_title" TEXT /* Title of the proposal */,
  "proposal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal type */,
  "proposal_status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection, if applicable */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_proposal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_type_id") REFERENCES proposal_types ("proposal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument type */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned maintenance */,
  "instrument_status" TEXT /* Status of the instrument (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_instrument_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type_id") REFERENCES instrument_types ("instrument_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., astronomer, researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposal_types" (
  "proposal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal type */,
  "proposal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the proposal type */,
  "proposal_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the proposal type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the proposal type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "instrument_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "instrument_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "instrument_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the instrument type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_types" (
  "observation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation type */,
  "observation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation type */,
  "observation_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the observation type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the observation type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposal_history" (
  "proposal_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal history entry */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "proposal_status_before" TEXT /* Status of the proposal before the change */,
  "proposal_status_after" TEXT /* Status of the proposal after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_history_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_history" (
  "observation_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation history entry */,
  "observation_id" TEXT /* ID of the observation */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "observation_status_before" TEXT /* Status of the observation before the change */,
  "observation_status_after" TEXT /* Status of the observation after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_history_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_history" (
  "instrument_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument history entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "instrument_status_before" TEXT /* Status of the instrument before the change */,
  "instrument_status_after" TEXT /* Status of the instrument after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_history" (
  "user_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "role_before" TEXT /* Role of the user before the change */,
  "role_after" TEXT /* Role of the user after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles_history" (
  "roles_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roles history entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "permissions_before" TEXT /* Permissions of the role before the change */,
  "permissions_after" TEXT /* Permissions of the role after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roles_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_history_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_configurations" (
  "instrument_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument configuration */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_configurations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_instruments" (
  "observation_id" TEXT /* ID of the observation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id", "instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_instruments_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES instrument_configurations ("instrument_configuration_id")
)
